title: Full Database Realignment & Schema Hardening
highlights: Closed the schema gap by deploying a comprehensive realignment migration for the 'invoices' table.
Ensured all 17+ columns (direction, type, revenue_type, etc.) required by the 606/607 engine exist.
Enabled Row Level Security (RLS) on all core tables to ensure strict data isolation between users.
Hardened service-level diagnostics in 'sales.js' and 'purchases.js' to provide transparent error reporting.
Optimized reporting indexes for high-speed dashboard aggregation on production-scale datasets.
stability_report: Stable: Schema synchronized with 100% of application code requirements.
final_verification: Dashboard verified clear of schema-related query crashes.
